translationsDesc: Edit translation strings for each locale and namespace. Add keys for new UI strings.
noTranslationsLocalesFound: No translation locales found. Create metadata/translations/en/ with namespace files (common.json, navigation.json, etc.).
noKeysInNamespace: No keys in this namespace. Click "Add key" to add one.
emailTemplatesDesc: Edit email templates used for notifications. Use {{variable}} for placeholders.
notificationSettingsDesc: Enable or disable email notifications for each event. Choose which template to use.
emailDesc: Configure SMTP settings for sending transactional emails.
sidebarDesc: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.
selectAtLeastOneItem: You have to select at least one item.
coverageHardcodedDesc: Strings in source code not yet converted to translation keys
nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
nameMaxLength: Name must not be longer than 30 characters.
pleaseSelectDateOfBirth: Please select your date of birth.
nameDisplayDescription: This is the name that will be displayed on your profile and in emails.
dateOfBirthDescription: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age.
languageDashboardDescription: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.
accountPageDescription: Update your account settings. Set your preferred language and timez...
appearanceSettingsUpdated: Your appearance settings have been updated.
fontDescription: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
selectTheme: Select the theme for the dashboard.
sidebarBehaviorDescription: When collapsed, the sidebar can expand on hover or stay locked until...
fontSizeDescription: Adjust the font size for the entire website. Range: 12px - 24px
appearancePageDescription: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between d...
displayPageDescription: Turn items on or off to control what
label: Label
subject: Subject
restartBackendForChanges: Restart the backend for changes to take effect.
enableEmailSendingDesc: When enabled, transactional emails will be sent via SMTP.
leaveBlankToKeepPassword: Leave blank to keep the existing password.
accountEmailsDesc: Receive emails about your account activity.
marketingEmailsDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
socialEmailsDesc: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
securityEmailsDesc: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
objectNameFormat: Use lowercase letters and numbers only (e.g. product, orderItem)
patternPlaceholderError: Pattern must contain exactly one digit placeholder, e.g. {000} or M...
atLeastOneOptionRequired: At least one option is required for select fields
eachOptionMustHaveValueAndLabel: Each option must have a value and label
startingNumberPositive: Starting number must be a positive integer
editEmailTemplateDesc: Edit the email template. Use {{variable}} for placeholders.
invalidProfileName: Invalid name. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
profileInfoDescription: Basic profile details. Name cannot be changed.
createProfileDescription: Create a new profile. You can configure object and field permissions after creation.
lowercaseLettersNumbersHyphens: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens. Used as identifier.
globalActionPermissionsDesc: Allow or deny each global action for this profile. Global actions include quick create buttons, tools, and other header bar actions.
globalActionPermissionsEmpty: No global actions defined. Add actions to metadata/global-actions.json to configure permissions.
globalActionPermissionsConfigureDesc: Configure which global actions (quick create, tools, etc.) are available for profile "{{profileName}}"
globalActionPermissionsAdminNote: Admin profile has full access to all global actions regardless of these settings.
globalActionPermissionsProfileDesc: Allow or deny global actions (quick create, tools, etc.) for this profile.
firstNameDescription: Your first name as shown to others.
lastNameDescription: Your last name as shown to others.
currentPasswordDescription: Enter your current password to verify your identity.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
passwordRequirements: At least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, and one number.
profilePageDescription: This is how others will see you on the site.
profilePageDescMerged: Manage your profile and account settings.
smtpNotConfigured: Email verification is unavailable until SMTP is configured by your administrator.
verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account. When enabled, you will receive a verification code by email when signing in.
smtpRequiredFor2FA: Two-factor authentication requires SMTP to be configured. Please contact your administrator.
disable2FADescription: Enter your password to confirm you want to disable two-factor authentication.
emailChangeDescription: To change your email, click the button above. You will need to verify the new address.
changeEmailDescription: Enter your new email address and current password. A verification link will be sent to your new email.
emailChangeVerificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your new email inbox to confirm the change.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
pendingEmailDescription: Check your new email inbox and click the verification link to complete the change.
